notes: Multiplayer can't run at all. When I run this game, it will crash all time.
title: Call of Duty®: Ghosts

notes: Works well out of the box, but the shader cache stuttering is pretty bad sometimes making it somewhat unplayable the first time.
title: Call of Duty®: Ghosts

notes: I played through the entire single player campaign at 1080P with medium to high settings. I tried to do the Coop game mode (Extinction) and it crashed. The performance was OK, but I am sure It could be at least 30% better than it was. It had some frame rate dips. It also crashed a few times. I was able to start the game in safe mode if I needed to. The game performance has been improving with every major version of Proton (4.2 is the best!) I also turned off some shader options that speed up loading up a level.
title: Call of Duty®: Ghosts

notes: Multiplayer works. Only playing a map for the first time is laggy.
title: Call of Duty®: Ghosts

notes: Is working a bit laggy. Now with the latest proton update the mouse sometimes moves up without a reason.
title: Call of Duty®: Ghosts

notes: Single Player, Multiplayer work flawless after shading compiling. Biggest issue is creating a private match in multiplayer will either crash the game or If lucky return an error message, "Invalid structure definition, stats group of type 3 named Z491056b8ad1e0039ae1af4b3163ff872d147bb90852667c95affe3c7 has empty data."
title: Call of Duty®: Ghosts

notes: Multiplayer tested only, cannot play squad. I tried disable esync and use d9vk, non of these works.
title: Call of Duty®: Ghosts

notes:
Single-Player only: Playing is stop-and-go, as shaders have to be created. Every new section of a map you visit might induce pauses and add to the processing time - however, redoing a level is a smooth experience. Game ended up crashing on a scuba level.

Also had to kill the processes manually after the crash.
title: Call of Duty®: Ghosts
